fficial_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7481972509529607230","book_info":{"abstract":"[无系统]+[废除八旗]+[剪辫易服]+[工业革命]+[经济腾飞]+[人口爆炸]+[全球扩张]+[中华帝国]
 
魂穿1735年九月初三，乾隆登基当天，华夏已然直面席卷全球的危机变局。
纽科门蒸汽机已投入商业使用二十三年，距离珍妮纺纱机发明还有二十九年，距离瓦特改良蒸汽机还有三十年，工业革命的浪潮近在眼前。
奥地利王位继承战争、欧洲七年战争、美国独立战争将至，西洋诸国即将崛起。
距离鸦片战争的炮火轰开国门，只剩下一百零五年。
 
华夏内部，朝中大臣固守祖宗旧制不肯变通，民间手工业还在依赖手工劳作，大明遗留的火器图谱在仓库积灰，沿海造船巧匠被海禁政策逼迫改行务农。
 
好在变革的根基还没有断绝，京城有精通西洋算学的传教士，江南民间藏着通晓机械制造的能工巧匠，水师之中有见过西洋战舰模样的老兵。
来得及，
一切还来得及！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3ebb4310cdca62116e38dc5a74d00462","author":"凉拌日月","author_id":"","book_id":"7481972509529607230","book_name":"窃清：中华崛起","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7481984874409116222","read_count":"19601","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1146310"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"457","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,皇帝,清朝,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c401e5180c98cb2eb5e795ea9c39c629~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256069&x-signature=147P3ZPjRUzgsBABzFCoDSoUd%2Fo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3131828733754029","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"182"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211347496B14B062AEA2ADBAA668"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读47分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_b
